prompt: Create a 3D version of floor plan based on the provided 2D floor plan draft. Render it in a photorealistic quality.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic 3D architectural visualization of the house floor plan shown in image 1. The rendering should depict all rooms and features from a top-down, elevated perspective, accurately translating the 2D layout into a three-dimensional space. Include the Master Bedroom on the left, the Bedroom on the right, both Bathrooms, all Closets, the central Living/Kitchen Area with its specified furniture, and the Front Porch at the bottom, maintaining their relative positions and dimensions as seen in image 1.
objects: Kitchen appliances and fixtures (island with sink, stove/oven)
